words.def: the head of a city government
a permanent organization of the military land forces of a nation or state
the month following April and preceding June
a column of light (as from a beacon)
words.zh: n. 光線, 射線, 閃爍, 光輝

words.def: a human limb; technically the part of the superior limb between the shoulder and the elbow but commonly used to refer to the whole superior limb
words.zh: n. 手臂, 袖子, 狹長港灣, 武器
